pageContext.name: Tigrex (Re-Pro) Creator's Model
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Capcom are excited to present the Tigrex (Re-Pro) Creator's Model Collectible Figure!  From the exciting video game franchise Monster Hunter, this colorful wyvern stands almost 8' tall with his large muscular wings and mouth open, ready to attack.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your collection today!
